metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for Config Manager — workflow skills, bash helper scripts, and custom agents for Copilot CLI and Claude Code

plugins.name: cm-dev-tools
plugins.description: 7 workflow skills (scaffold, fleet review, release, PR lifecycle, parity check, PR comments, docs sync) + bash helper scripts + MCP server + 2 custom agents for the Config Manager project. Works with GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code.
